节点.功能描述: Provides methods for rdbStore create and delete.
Obtains an RDB store. You can set parameters of the RDB store as required. In general, this method is recommended to obtain a rdb store.
注释信息: @param { Context } context - Indicates the context of application or capability.
@param { StoreConfig } config - Indicates the {@link StoreConfig} configuration of the database related to this RDB store.
@param { number } version - Indicates the database version for upgrade or downgrade.
@param { AsyncCallback<RdbStore> } callback - The RDB store {@link RdbStore}.

parameters.说明: Indicates the context of application or capability.
Indicates the {@link StoreConfig} configuration of the database related to this RDB store.
Indicates the database version for upgrade or downgrade.
The RDB store {@link RdbStore}.

节点.功能描述: Indicates the database synchronization mode.

Provides methods for managing the relational database (RDB). This class provides methods for creating, querying, updating, and deleting RDBs.

parameters.说明: Indicates Indicates the row of data to be updated in the database.
Indicates the specified update condition by the instance object of  {@link RdbPredicates}.
The number of affected rows.

节点.功能描述: Registers an observer for the database. When data in the distributed database changes, the callback will be invoked. If its value is SUBSCRIBE_TYPE_REMOTE, ohos.permission.DISTRIBUTED_DATASYNC is required.
注释信息: @param { 'dataChange' } event - Indicates the event must be string 'dataChange'.
@param { SubscribeType } type - Indicates the subscription type, which is defined in {@link SubscribeType}.
@param { Callback<Array<string>> } observer - {Array<string>}: The observer of data change events in the distributed database.

parameters.说明: Indicates the event must be string 'dataChange'.
Indicates the subscription type, which is defined in {@link SubscribeType}.
{Array<string>}: The observer of data change events in the distributed database.

节点.功能描述: Remove specified observer of specified type from the database. If its value is SUBSCRIBE_TYPE_REMOTE, ohos.permission.DISTRIBUTED_DATASYNC is required.
注释信息: @param { 'dataChange' } event - Indicates the event must be string 'dataChange'.
@param { SubscribeType } type - Indicates the subscription type, which is defined in {@link SubscribeType}.
@param { Callback<Array<string>> } observer - {Array<string>}: The data change observer already registered.

parameters.说明: Indicates the event must be string 'dataChange'.
Indicates the subscription type, which is defined in {@link SubscribeType}.
{Array<string>}: The data change observer already registered.
